nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: Saccharomyces/Hydrolyzed (Arnica Montana Flower/Stem/Camellia Sinensis Leaf/Equisetum Arvense Needle/Stem/Fucus Vesiculosus/Jojoba Meal/Juniperus Sabina Leaf/Matricaria Flower/Melia Azadirachta Leaf/Nettle Leaf/ Rosemary Leaf/Stem/Yucca Schidigera Leaf/Root)/Allantoin/Caprylyl Glycol/Cocamide MEA/Cocamidopropyl Betaine/Sodium Laureth Sulfate Ferment Filtrate
chemicalDescription: This is a filtrate of the product obtained by the fermentation of the hydrolysate of: Arnica montana flowers and stems, Camellia sinensis leaves, Equisetum arvense needles and stems; Fucus vesiculosus; Simmondsia chinensis (jojoba) meal; Juniperus sabina leaves; Chamomilla recutita (matricaria) flowers; Melia azadirachta leaves; Urtica dioica (nettle) leaves; Rosmarinus officinalis (rosemary) leaves and stems; Yucca schidigera leaves and roots, with Allantoin, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Cocamide MEA, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, and Caprylyl Glycol, by the microorganism, Saccharomyces.
inciName: SACCHAROMYCES/HYDROLYZED (ARNICA MONTANA FLOWER/STEM/CAMELLIA SINENSIS LEAF/EQUISETUM ARVENSE NEEDLE/STEM/FUCUS VESICULOSUS/JOJOBA MEAL/JUNIPERUS SABINA LEAF/MATRICARIA FLOWER/MELIA AZADIRACHTA LEAF/NETTLE LEAF/ ROSEMARY LEAF/STEM/YUCCA SCHIDIGERA LEAF/ROOT)/ALLANTOIN/CAPRYLYL GLYCOL/COCAMIDE MEA/COCAMIDOPROPYL BETAINE/SODIUM LAURETH SULFATE FERMENT FILTRATE
